name: Parser
description: This app extracts IOCs from various files such as PDFs, emails, or raw text

actions.name: Extract Ioc
actions.description: Create IOC artifacts from a file in the vault or raw text

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: Raw text from which to extract IOCs

parameters.name: is_structured
parameters.description: Use first row of CSV file as field names

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Add created artifacts to this container

parameters.name: remap_cef_fields
parameters.description: Remap the CEF fields with new field names; Optionally, also apply an internal CEF -> CIM field name mapping. Note: (source|destination)Address will be mapped to (src|dest)_ip respectively instead of src|dest (not applicable to .eml filetype)
parameters.default: Do not apply CEF -> CIM remapping, only apply custom remap

parameters.name: custom_remap_json
parameters.description: Custom set of CEF field name mappings. This is a serialized json dictionary (json.dumps) of Key/Value pairs where Key is an existing field name and Value is the resultant name (not applicable to .eml filetype)

parameters.name: run_automation
parameters.description: Enable run_automation for newly created artifacts

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Severity for the newly created artifacts

parameters.name: artifact_tags
parameters.description: Tags to add to artifacts (comma separated). Tag should only contain characters A-Z, a-z, 0-9, _, and -. Blank spaces will be ignored
